name: mindfeint
description: Social deduction where the AIs are provably real — built on 0G.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c magenta,cyan "npm --prefix backend run server" "npm --prefix frontend run dev"
scripts.install:all: npm --prefix backend install && npm --prefix frontend install --legacy-peer-deps
scripts.build: npm --prefix backend install && npm --prefix frontend install --legacy-peer-deps --include=dev && npm --prefix frontend run build
